results.summary: All splits meet minimum image count thresholds.
Every image has a matching label file.
All 4811 annotations have valid YOLO coordinates.

negative_images.note: Zero negative images found. The Roboflow export of NWPU VHR-10 includes only the 650 positive images from the original dataset; the 150 background images (negative image set) were excluded during the Roboflow project setup.
